rn. As Mars is in a watery
Sun
sign in the house next to Jupiter he will Sat. Ven. Mer.
also serve in a trading concern of Dt.
drinks like Toddy etc. He will make
much improvement from 27-28 onwards.
In the 5th house to Jupiter, Sun-Mercury and Ketu are posited. So he
will have 2 male and 2 female issues. He will also own some dry land as there
is Mars in the second to Jupiter. When Saturn transits Cancer and Leo, the
native will come to own a house between 47-51. His 68-70 years will be full
of happiness. As Venus contacts Saturn and later Rahu, his wife will suffer
from wind troubles
CHART 68
This native has Mercury who
Sun rules the intellect in the house of Moon
Mars
Ven. who signifies the mind. He will have a
highly developed intellect and will
Dt. Mer. achieve success in his educational
career. His character will be governed
Db.· by moral law (Dharma). He will be
learned in Vedas and Medicine. His
Sat. Moon education will last upto 23-24 years.
Jup.
